basics.name: Roy Yuchen He
basics.label: Assistant Professor
basics.summary: Assistant Professor in the Department of Mathematics at City University of Hong Kong. Research interests include variational and statistical image processing, data-driven modeling, PDE identification, machine learning theory, and computer graphics.

location.address: Department of Mathematics, City University of Hong Kong, Tat Chee Avenue, Kowloon

work.name: City University of Hong Kong
highlights: Focus: Dynamical data analysis and modeling, deep learning theories and applications in inverse problems.

work.name: Shanghai Jiao Tong University
highlights: Focus: Dynamical data analysis and modeling, deep learning theories and applications in inverse problems.

work.name: Duke University
work.summary: Department of Mathematics. Offer issued; worked remotely due to COVID-related travel restrictions.
highlights: Focus: PDE identification, image processing and deep learning.

work.name: École Normale Supérieure Paris-Saclay
highlights: Focus: Image processing and image vectorization.
Dissertation: Data-driven Mathematical Modeling: Applications in Image Processing, Computer Graphics, and PDE Identification
Focus: Variational and statistical modeling in image processing, neural networks, and numerical analysis.
Bachelor thesis: Statistical Description of Roots of the ζ Function

awards.title: GT Sigma Xi Best PhD Thesis Award
awards.summary: Awarded for the best PhD thesis of 2021.

awards.title: International Postdoctoral Exchange Fellowship
awards.summary: Awarded for excellent young scientific researchers who earned their Ph.D. degree abroad.

awards.title: Larry O'Hara Graduate Student Fellowship
awards.summary: Awarded for excellent young scientific researcher.

awards.title: Chateaubriand Fellowship
awards.awarder: Embassy of France in the United States
awards.summary: Supported a 6-month visit to École Normale Supérieure Paris-Saclay to work with Prof. Jean-Michel Morel.

awards.title: Teaching Assistant Fellowship
awards.summary: For extraordinary TA performance in Fall 2016 and Spring 2017.

awards.title: 2nd Place, National Undergraduate Mathematical Contest in Modeling
awards.awarder: China Society for Industrial and Applied Mathematics (CSIAM)
awards.summary: Awarded to 1000 out of 40000 teams in China.

awards.title: National Scholarship
awards.summary: Awarded for outstanding academic performance. Only 0.2% of nationwide applicants receive this scholarship.
